# Evaluation Design Skill

Use this skill when:
- an AI feature needs measurable release criteria
- a prompt/RAG/agent system needs regression testing
- stakeholders are claiming quality without evidence
- pilot vs production gating must be decided

## Skill objectives

- define the evaluation strategy
- identify failure modes
- define thresholds and release gates
- create a regression-oriented test plan

## Required output

1. Evaluation objective
2. Failure model
3. Test categories
4. Dataset/rubric requirements
5. Thresholds
6. Regression plan
7. Ship recommendation

## Checklist

- offline evals included
- online monitoring included
- adversarial cases included
- golden dataset requirements included
- thresholds are numeric or clearly bounded
- release recommendation tied to evidence
